zh.lifeSummary: 當George Denison於1620年12月10日在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德受洗時，他的父親William Denison48歲，母親Margaret Chandler43歲。他於1640年3月與Bridget Thompson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1644年住在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克且於1644年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦斯東寧頓。他於1636年登記服兵役。他去世於1694年10月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德享年73歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Denison于1620年12月10日在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德受洗时，他的父亲William Denison48岁，母亲Margaret Chandler43岁。他于1640年3月与Bridget Thompson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1644年住在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克且于1644年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦斯東寧頓。他于1636年登记服兵役。他去世于1694年10月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德享年73岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Denison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of a Slavic patronymic from the personal name Denis or Denys , such as Russian Denisov or Ukrainian Denysenko or Denysevych.

variants.name: Dennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Denis (see Dennis ) + -son. Compare Tennyson .
English (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French deinzein, a burgess who enjoyed the privileges of those living deinz la cité ‘within the city’.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.
William of Orange (William III) lands at Carrickfergus and defeats James II at Battle of the Boyne.

en.lifeSummary: When George Denison was christened on 10 December 1620, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, his father, William Denison, was 48 and his mother, Margaret Chandler, was 43. He married Bridget Thompson in March 1640, in Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He lived in Cork, County Cork, Ireland in 1644 and Stonington, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America in 1644. He registered for military service in 1636. He died on 23 October 1694, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 73, and was buried in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: George Denisonが1620年12月10日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで洗礼を受けた時，父William Denisonは48歳，母Margaret Chandlerは43歳であった。1640年3月にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーロクスブリーでBridget Thompsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1644年にはアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクに，1644年にはイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンストニントンに住んでいた。彼は1636年に兵役登録をした。彼は1694年10月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードで73歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: George Denison(이)가 1620년 12월 10일 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 William Denison(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Chandler(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1640년 3월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 록스버이에서 Bridget Thompson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1644년도에 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서, 1644년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 스토닝턴에서 살았다. 그는 1636년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1694년 10월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Denison foi batizado em 10 de dezembro de 1620, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Denison, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Chandler, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Bridget Thompson em março de 1640, em Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda em 1644 e em Stonington, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America em 1644. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1636. Ele faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1694, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Denison был крещен 10 декабря 1620 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Denison было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Chandler, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Bridget Thompson марта 1640 г. в местности роксбури, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он жил в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия в 1644 году и в местности стонингтон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1644 году. В 1636 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 23 октября 1694 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Denison se bautizó el 10 de diciembre de 1620, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Denison, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Margaret Chandler, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Bridget Thompson en marzo de 1640, en Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Vivió en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda en 1644 y en Stonington, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America en 1644. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1636. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1694, en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
